sdkBundles.description: Bundled @servicenow/sdk + @servicenow/glide for authoring Flow Designer flows, Script Includes, ACLs, and more declaratively in TypeScript.

servers.description: Drive a real browser for ServiceNow UI work â€” flow validation, workspace probing, portal smoke, dashboard verification, playbook UI checks. Per-project Chromium profile preserves saved passwords, history, and any persistent cookies (incl. SN 'Remember me' sessions when ticked at login).

headed.label: Show browser window (headed mode)
headed.description: Headed mode lets you watch the automation. Disable for headless / CI.

screenshotsDir.label: Screenshots folder
screenshotsDir.description: Where Playwright saves screenshots. Path is relative to project root.

profileDir.label: Browser profile folder
profileDir.description: Persistent Chromium profile per project. Preserves saved passwords, history, localStorage, and any cookies the server flags as persistent. SN's default session cookie is session-only â€” tick 'Remember me' at login if you want auth to survive browser close. Per-project keeps SN instance sessions isolated.

useCases: Building or validating Flow Designer flows

servers.description: Interactive 3D galaxy visualization for Sentinel discovery data. Renders tables, artifacts, and relationships as an explorable solar system â€” tables are suns, artifacts orbit as planets, edges are gravitational links. Requires Sentinel cache data (run discover_table_ecosystem first).

bloomIntensity.label: Bloom / glow intensity
bloomIntensity.description: Controls the glow effect on nodes and particles

particleDensity.label: Particle density
particleDensity.description: Number of ambient particles. Lower for slower GPUs.

cameraMode.label: Default camera mode
cameraMode.description: Orbit locks onto a focal point. Fly allows WASD free navigation.

useCases: Exploring a ServiceNow instance's table ecosystem in 3D
Identifying configuration hotspots and sprawl visually
